content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "valid_schema_removal",
      "input": ["schemaId123"],
      "output": "Schema removed successfully",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the removal of a valid schema by ID."
    },
    {
      "name": "nonexistent_schema_removal",
      "input": ["schemaId999"],
      "output": "Schema not found",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the behavior when trying to remove a schema that does not exist."
    },
    {
      "name": "empty_schema_id",
      "input": [""],
      "output": "Invalid schema ID",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the handling of an empty schema ID input."
    },
    {
      "name": "null_schema_id",
      "input": [null],
      "output": "Invalid schema ID",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the handling of a null schema ID input."
    },
    {
      "name": "multiple_schema_removal",
      "input": [["schemaId1", "schemaId2"]],
      "output": "Schemas removed successfully",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the removal of multiple valid schemas."
    },
    {
      "name": "invalid_schema_format",
      "input": ["invalidSchemaFormat"],
      "output": "Invalid schema format",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the handling of an incorrectly formatted schema ID."
    },
    {
      "name": "large_schema_id",
      "input": ["schemaId" + "a".repeat(1000)],
      "output": "Schema removed successfully",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the removal of a schema with a very large ID."
    },
    {
      "name": "schema_removal_with_dependencies",
      "input": ["schemaIdWithDependencies"],
      "output": "Cannot remove schema with dependencies",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the behavior when trying to remove a schema that has dependencies."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "Schema IDs are unique and follow a specific format.",
  "notes": "Ensure to validate schema IDs against defined patterns."
}
